proofs.control: Edge logic is consistent across runs

evidence.determinism: Pure computation in real-edge-service.ts and packages/domain/src/edge-validation/
evidence.no_external_state: Edge computation reads only from function arguments — no DB, no env, no time
evidence.consensus_method: Multi-book weighted average of devigged probabilities

proofs.notes: Edge = model_probability - devigged_market_probability. Pure computation with no randomness, no external state, no time dependency. Same provider odds + model confidence always produces identical edge value.

proofs.control: Edge signals are derived from real data

data_sources.ingestion: SGO API (SGO_API_KEY) + The Odds API (ODDS_API_KEY) via apps/ingestor

evidence.no_synthetic_data: All odds come from live provider APIs, stored in provider_offers
evidence.model_scores: Derived from real market features, not hardcoded
evidence.devig_input: Real provider odds → devigged probability → edge computation

proofs.notes: Edge signals source from 0 real providers (). 0 provider_offers rows, 20 pick_candidates. No synthetic/fabricated data in pipeline.

proofs.control: Edge features are measurable and not cosmetic

measurable_outputs.beatsClosingLine: Boolean: did the line move in our favor?

evidence.not_cosmetic: Edge directly determines promotion eligibility and board placement — it gates real output (Discord posts)
evidence.impact_chain: edge → promotion score → board rank → outbox enqueue → Discord delivery

proofs.notes: Edge is quantifiable (realEdge delta), validated post-hoc via CLV (12/40 picks have CLV). Edge gates promotion eligibility — not cosmetic. Test coverage in edge-validation.test.ts.
